title: polygala tonkinensis
intro: Polygala tonkinensis, also known as Yuan Zhi, is a type of flowering plant in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to calm the mind, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve sleep quality. The roots and flowers of Polygala tonkinensis are used to make herbal preparations, which are believed to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing inflammation. In traditional Chinese medicine, Polygala tonkinensis is often combined with other herbs to create formulas that promote relaxation, reduce anxiety, and improve overall well-being.
